{{Quote|Ingo Dar. I am called Ingo Dar.|Ingo Dar|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Star by Star" />}}
'''Ingo Dar''' was a male [[Yuuzhan Vong]] warrior who escorted [[Viqi Shesh]] when she tried to kidnap [[Ben Skywalker]] from the Solos' apartment. He wore an [[ooglith masquer]] during the operation to disguise himself as a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]].<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Star by Star" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
